arts.ttl: PSG sign Napoli forward Kvaratskhelia until 2029
arts.sum: Paris St-Germain sign Napoli and Georgia forward Khvicha Kvaratskhelia on a deal until June 2029.

arts.ttl: Man City players have found their joy - Guardiola
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola says his team have rediscovered the "joy" in their job after a 6-0 Premier League win over Ipswich Town.

arts.ttl: Man City's Stones 'back' for UCL clash with PSG
arts.sum: Manchester City's defence will be strengthened by the return of John Stones, manager Pep Guardiola said, as they get ready to resume their Champions League campaign at Paris St Germain on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Arsenal urged to follow Manchester City transfer example after Matheus Cunha developments
arts.sum: Charles Watts fears that Arsenal have "missed the boat" for a January move for Wolverhampton Wanderers' Matheus Cunha, in spite of recent intriguing developments.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola confirms major Man City injury boost as new signing revealed
arts.sum: Fresh faces join Premier League champions as key man returns from absence

arts.ttl: Wolverhampton Alerted as Arsenal Continues to Monitor €70M-Rated PSG Transfer Target
arts.sum: Matheus Cunha quickly became a key figure for Wolverhampton Wanderers, showcasing his versatility in various attacking roles. The Brazilian adapted effortlessly to the Premier League, thriving as an attacking midfielder, supporting striker, or even leading the line as a center-forward. arts.ttl: Erling Haaland responds to Man City 115 charges question after signing enormous contract
arts.sum: Erling Haaland has become the highest-paid player in England with a new deal he signed on Friday, despite Manchester City still being under the cloud of their legal battle with the Premier League

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland says he ‘hadn’t thought’ about upcoming ruling on 115 charges before committing to new Man City deal
arts.sum: Asked directly if he was happy to have ruled out 15-time European champions Madrid, Haaland said: “I just signed a nine-and-a-half-year deal, so what do you want me to say? Haaland signed an extraordinary new nine-and-a-half year contract with the reigning Premier League champions worth a reported basic £500,000 per week last Friday.

arts.ttl: Man City charges had no impact on new deal - Haaland
arts.sum: Erling Haaland says he is "confident" Manchester City know what they are doing over the charges they face after signing a new long-term deal.

arts.ttl: Tottenham, PSG’s £70M-Rated Target Reveals Transfer Stance Amid Man Utd Exit Rumors
arts.sum: Rúben Amorim’s decision to exclude Alejandro Garnacho from last month’s Manchester derby has fueled speculation about the winger’s future at Manchester United.
